Calc-p..Back: The back pains are worse in cold, stormy weather, attended with stiffness, and worse in the morning. The back is sensitive to draft. Pain in the back from lifting or straining. Curvature of spine. Tearing, shooting; tenderness and aching in the spine. Soreness in sacroiliac symphysis. Pain in lumbar region and sacrum at the menstrual period.
Calc-p..Back, pain: Pain in the back from lifting or straining. Curvature of spine. Tearing, shooting; tenderness and aching in the spine. Soreness in sacroiliac symphysis. Pain in lumbar region and sacrum at the menstrual period.
Calc-p..Chest: Stitching pains in the chest. Emaciation of the chest. Difficult expectoration. It is a very useful remedy in phthisis and blood spitting. Much sweat on the chest. Rattling in the chest with difficult expectoration, like Caust. Soreness of the chest to touch. Palpitation, with trembling of the limbs.
Calc-p..Extremities: Rheumatic pains in the limbs in cold weather, worse from motion, better during rest and from heat. Trembling in all the limbs. Stiffness after resting, and in the morning. Aching in the bones, like growing pains. Gouty fingers and toes that become painful in cold weather. Ulcerative pains in the roots of the nails.
Calc-p..Extremities, coldness: The most severe tearing, shooting pains are in the lower limbs. The probable reason for this is that the lower limbs are always cold to the knees, and the cold parts are always the suffering parts in this remedy.
Calc-p..Generalities: The complaints of this remedy are generally better during rest, come on during motion, and are greatly aggravated by exertion. Stiffness on moving in bed. General bodily weakness. Numbness of many parts. Trembling. Fear brings on complaints; palpitation.
Calc-p..Genitalia female: Her sufferings at puberty when she is slow in maturing are often met by this medicine. From taking cold at first menstrual period often comes a painful menstruation that lasts during menstrual life, unless cured by this remedy. Violent cramping in uterus and groin several hours before the flow starts, relieved after the flow has been fully established.
Calc-p..Genitalia female, pain: Violent cramping in uterus and groin several hours before the flow starts, relieved after the flow has been fully established. The pains make her cry out. Burning in the vagina and uterus during menses.
Calc-p..Head: The dull headaches of school children-always come home from school with headache. The head is sensitive to a jar, to pressure, to the hat; wants it washed in cold water; wants to be quite and alone. Throbbing and burning in the head. Rheumatic headache, seems to be in the whole head, in cold weather, being out in the cold wind; worse from walking, worse from exertion, worse at night.
Calc-p..Mind: The mind shows above all a tired and weak brain. Feeble memory, and inability to sustain mental effort. Suffering in the head from mental exertion. Dreads mental exertion. Sluggish mind. Imbecility. Feeble minded children.
Calc-p..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Discontented with his own surroundings and goes from place to place.
Calc-p..Mouth: Foul taste in mouth. Bitter taste in the morning. Tongue coated in the morning. Tongue swollen, numb and stiff.
Calc-p..Rectum: Constipation, with difficult, hard stool. Bleeding from the rectum and anus during stool. Protruding piles so painful that he is kept in bed for weeks; the pain is intense standing, walking, from touch; ameliorated by heat; with general sufferings, every sudden cold change of the weather. Piles itch and burn and discharge yellow pus. Itching of the anus in the evening.
Calc-p..Respiration: Suffocation on slight exertion, or on ascending stairs. In thin, pale, sickly people with dry, hacking cough worse in cold, damp weather in rheumatic constitutions. Yellow expectoration.
Calc-p..Skin: Pale, waxy skin; anaemia. Itching, burning, eruptions.
Calc-p..Sleep: Sleepy daytime and evening. Sleepless after going to bed until midnight or later. Very sleepy in the morning. Vivid dreams. Children cry out in sleep. Frightful dreams cause him to awaken with a start.
Calc-p..Sleep, sleepiness: Sleepy daytime and evening. Very sleepy in the morning.
Calc-p..Stomach: Easily disordered stomach. Cold drinks, ice cream, fruits disorder the stomach, causing pain or diarrhoea. Pain in stomach after food. Eructations and nausea. Soreness in the stomach. Sour eructations, nausea and vomiting. Burning in the stomach.
Calc-p..Appetite, ravenous, canine, excessive: Strong appetite. Infants want to nurse all the time. Gnawing, empty feeling in the stomach.
Calc-p..Appetite, desires, meat: Craves salt bacon and smoked meats.
Calc-p..Stomach, pain: Pain in stomach after food. Violent pain in the stomach; diarrhoea aggravated by the least food.
Calc-p..Abdomen, pain: Burning in the abdomen, rising up into the chest. Pain in the abdomen ameliorated by passing flatus. Colic, followed by diarrhoea.
Calc-p..Mind, restlessness: Discontented with his own surroundings and goes from place to place.
Calc-p..Appetite: Strong appetite. Infants want to nurse all the time. Craves salt bacon and smoked meats.
Calc-p..Appetite, ravenous: Strong appetite. Infants want to nurse all the time. Gnawing, empty feeling in the stomach.
Calc-p..Appetite, desires: Craves salt bacon and smoked meats.
Calc-p..Clinical: It has cured polypi of nose, rectum and uterus. It has cured enlarged glands of the neck, groin and abdomen. Non-union of fractured bones, swollen condyles, are symptoms accepted by all text-books as strong symptoms of this remedy.
Calc-p..Abdomen, liver: After becoming chilled, pain in the liver, soreness, aggravated after eating and by motion; wants to keep quiet. Stitching pains in the liver from deep breathing or sudden motion. Pulsating in the liver.
